user.title: Mathlin Booking System
user.description: Enter the URL of your Scout Group website. The Mathlin Booking WordPress plugin must be installed and active.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the website. Check the URL and try again.
error.plugin_not_found: Connected to the website but the booking plugin API was not found. Make sure the Mathlin Booking plugin is installed and active in WordPress.
error.invalid_url: That doesn't look like a valid URL.

init.title: Booking Automation Timing
init.description: Configure when the automation events fire relative to each booking.

data_description.pre_event_minutes: The 'booking_start' event fires this many minutes before the booking begins — use it to pre-heat the hall, turn on lights, unlock the door, etc. Set to 0 to fire at the exact start time.
data_description.post_event_minutes: The 'booking_end' event fires this many minutes after the booking finishes — use it to turn off heating, lights, lock up, etc. Set to 0 to fire at the exact end time.
data_description.gap_minutes: If another booking on the same space starts within this many minutes of the current booking ending, the 'booking_end' event is skipped — keeping heating/lights on between back-to-back bookings. Set to 0 to always fire end events.
